text.title: Decision Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the decision-analysis methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-decision
step.action: Write outcome-shaped statement; include status quo in option set.

step.name: generate-options
step.action: Divergence pass; minimum 3 options including status quo.

step.name: elicit-weights
step.action: Individual weight elicitation; emit per-stakeholder vector.

step.name: reconcile-and-score
step.action: Reconcile to group weights; score each option × criterion by SME.

step.name: sensitivity-and-document
step.action: One-at-a-time perturbation; document recommendation + dissent + traceability.

step.name: review-and-sign-off
step.action: Governance review; capture dissent; tag and archive.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
